Patch Set 4:

Hi Andreas,

This patch for Lustre b2_10 branch only fixes the test scripts to make them interoperate with master branch that has 4MB default stripe size. Could you please review? Thank you.

Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

Consider the patch https://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/31589/, hold this patch until related issues resolved.

Abandoned

Abandon test change, this isn't needed for b2_10.

commit.subject: LU-10465 tests: interoperate with 4MB stripe size server
commit.message:
LU-10465 tests: interoperate with 4MB stripe size server

This patch fixes tests to interoperate with servers that have
4MB default stripe size.

Test-Parameters: mdsjob=lustre-reviews ossjob=lustre-reviews \
serverbuildno=54821 testlist=sanity,sanity-hsm,conf-sanity

Test-Parameters: mdsjob=lustre-master ossjob=lustre-master \
serverbuildno=3715 testlist=sanity,sanity-hsm,conf-sanity

Change-Id: I83534315e4f25bb8ab4ab7d6b3b93638dbb7c80d
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <jian.yu@intel.com>
